features.text: Business Profile Media Notes tab — view images and video content shared by businesses.
Note-level item creation flow added to Notes panel with 3-level action buttons.
How To Use section in Main Menu — 5 illustrated guides for core features.
Location filter now correctly filters businesses by neighbourhood in real time.
Trusted businesses correctly persist between app sessions using local storage.
Business profile back button now correctly returns to previous directory view.
Wonda surveys launching next Sunday — earn Notes for completing community polls.
Price Watch Notes — confirm and submit prices for community consensus tracking.
Contacts tab in Business Profile — Call, Facebook and WhatsApp directories fully functional.
Business News tab — read articles and updates directly from businesses.
Onlines tab — view all of a business's website and social media links in one place.
Search bar keyboard dismiss on scroll now working correctly on Android 13+.
Bottom nav bar visibility on scroll fixed for all pages including Promos.
Service worker cache invalidation corrected — stale data issue resolved.
Media Notes tab for businesses — images, videos and audio from business profiles.
Promos — Weekly tab with Main Category accordion navigation now live with 12 categories.
Promos — Sub-category pill navigation with collage timeline view of promotional content.
Promos — Mediums tab for browsing Podcasts, Radio, Newspapers, DSTV and more.
Promos — Events tab with upcoming event listings and descriptions.
Business cards now correctly expand and collapse on tap with smooth animation.
Category selector dropdown in Directory now closes on outside tap.
Promo collage timeline — showing actual WebP promotional files from verified businesses.
Business Directory — infinite scroll with 50+ seeded businesses across all 5 categories.
Trusted feature — tap the green bar on any business to add it to your Trusted list.
Trusted tab in Directory — quickly browse only your trusted businesses.
Contact icons (Phone, Facebook, WhatsApp) on every business card — colour-coded by availability.
Main Menu slide animation smoothed out on older Android devices using cubic-bezier easing.
Business News and Media Notes tabs — launching next update.
Main Menu overlay — Profile, Notes, Trusted, About TapFo and How To Use.
Location filter panel — select your city and area/neighbourhood for local business results.
App version and changelog accessible from Main Menu footer.
App install shortcut now correctly displays TapFo icon on Android home screen.
Page transition animations now consistent across all page-to-page navigation.
Full Business Profile with Services, Contacts and Media tabs.
TapFo.bw web app — initial public release for Android and desktop browsers.
Home screen with search bar, 5 category quick links and city/area location filters.
PWA installation — add to home screen for offline access and app-like experience.
Offline-first architecture — app works fully without an internet connection.
Service worker installed — background sync and cache management active.
Full business directory with all categories launching next week — 50+ businesses ready.
